decision.recommended_next_action: Finalize this branch; if more budget is allocated, separately test native vLLM/SGLang function-call parser configurations rather than creating another generic successor.
decision.stop_reason: A production-style vLLM Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct endpoint reproduced the parent result: no-debug transcript scored 0% on 100 cases while answer_contract scored 100% on the same 100 and all 1,000 cases.

recommended_next_action: Finalize this branch; if more budget is allocated, separately test native vLLM/SGLang function-call parser configurations rather than creating another generic successor.
run_notes_tail: 5. Stop any helper servers, run tests/smoke verification, and refresh the decision artifact.
## Initial inspection
- Branch directory started as a routing artifact with `.omx/` metadata and `prompts/` only; no benchmark code, data, or results existed locally.
- Parent project at `<local-path-redacted>` contains the complete cache-reentry harness, 1k dataset, deterministic/serving baselines, model-backed shim results, and tests.
## Production endpoint validation pass (2026-04-16)
- Copied the parent benchmark harness, tests, 1k dataset, deterministic summary, and key parent Qwen0.5B comparison summaries into this branch so the routing artifact became executable locally.

- Created a branch-local `.venv` and installed vLLM 0.19.0. The first vLLM import failed with CPU Torch (`ImportError: libtorch_cuda.so`), and the first CUDA repair to Torch 2.11.0+cu130 exposed an ABI mismatch (`undefined symbol: _ZN3c1013MessageLoggerC1EPKciib`). Pinning to vLLM's required CUDA Torch line (`torch==2.10.0+cu130`, `torchvision==0.25.0+cu130`, `torchaudio==2.10.0+cu130`) fixed the launch path.

- Launched a production-style vLLM OpenAI-compatible endpoint from `/tmp/cache-reentry-services` on `127.0.0.1:18090/v1` using cached `Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct`, served as `qwen2.5-3b-instruct`, with `--max-model-len 4096` and `--gpu-memory-utilization 0.70`.

- Verified `/v1/models` and `/v1/chat/completions` before scoring. The vLLM server rejected `tool_choice=auto` unless launched with an auto-tool parser, so I added benchmark support for `--omit-tools` while preserving the transcript/tool-result chat messages. This records the production endpoint behavior without hiding a benchmark label/debug JSON.
- No-debug transcript prompt on the first balanced 100 examples scored 0.0 exact pass (`results/vllm_qwen2_5_3b_instruct_transcript_100_summary.json`); all failures were `wrong_answer`.
- No-debug `answer_contract` prompt on the same 100 examples scored 1.0 exact pass across all five scenarios (`results/vllm_qwen2_5_3b_instruct_answer_contract_100_summary.json`).

- Full 1,000-example no-debug `answer_contract` run against the same vLLM endpoint also scored 1.0 exact pass with no failures (`results/vllm_qwen2_5_3b_instruct_answer_contract_full_summary.json` and raw predictions JSONL).
## Interpretation

- The parent no-debug transcript versus answer-contract result generalized from a local Transformers shim (`Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct`) to a production-grade vLLM endpoint running a larger cached `Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct` model.

- The branch kill condition is not met: a vLLM endpoint was provisioned successfully, `/v1/models` and `/v1/chat/completions` were verified, and the answer-contract adapter improved exact pass from 0% to 100% on the matched 100-example comparison and held at 100% on all 1,000 examples.

- Remaining risk: the vLLM run used plain chat completions with transcript/tool-result messages and omitted the OpenAI `tools` schema because this endpoint was not launched with a compatible `--enable-auto-tool-choice --tool-call-parser` setup. This validates the answer-contract serving adapter on vLLM, but not vLLM's native function-call parser behavior.
## Verification (production endpoint pass)
- Ran: `uv venv --python /usr/bin/python3 .venv`
- Ran: `uv pip install --python .venv/bin/python vllm`
- Ran: `uv pip install --python .venv/bin/python 'torch==2.10.0+cu130' 'torchvision==0.25.0+cu130' 'torchaudio==2.10.0+cu130' --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu130 --upgrade`

- Ran: `.venv/bin/python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --host 127.0.0.1 --port 18090 --model Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct --served-model-name qwen2.5-3b-instruct --max-model-len 4096 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.70 --no-enable-log-requests` from `/tmp/cache-reentry-services`.

- Ran: `.venv/bin/python src/tool_serving_benchmark.py --base-url http://127.0.0.1:18090/v1 --config qwen2.5-3b-instruct --limit 100 --no-debug-json --omit-tools --max-tokens 64 --prompt-style transcript` => 0.0 exact pass, 100 wrong-answer failures.

- Ran: `.venv/bin/python src/tool_serving_benchmark.py --base-url http://127.0.0.1:18090/v1 --config qwen2.5-3b-instruct --limit 100 --no-debug-json --omit-tools --max-tokens 64 --prompt-style answer_contract` => 1.0 exact pass.

- Ran: `.venv/bin/python src/tool_serving_benchmark.py --base-url http://127.0.0.1:18090/v1 --config qwen2.5-3b-instruct --no-debug-json --omit-tools --max-tokens 64 --prompt-style answer_contract` => 1,000 predictions, 1.0 exact pass.
- Ran: `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests` => OK, 6 tests.
- Checked: `ss -ltnp | grep -E '18090|18091'` returned no listeners after stopping vLLM with Ctrl-C, so no helper server was left running.
5. Stop any helper servers, run tests/smoke verification, and refresh the decision artifact.
